hero.title: CSR Policy
hero.subtitle: As per Section 135 of the Companies Act, 2013

items.title: 1. Vision
items.content: Empower India's MSMEs and underserved entrepreneurs through financial literacy, skilling and access to credit.

items.title: 2. Focus areas
items.content: Financial literacy for women entrepreneurs, vocational training for MSME workforce, vernacular digital education, disaster relief.

items.title: 3. CSR Committee
items.content: A board-level CSR Committee oversees policy, project approvals and impact reporting.

items.title: 4. Budget
items.content: Minimum 2% of average net profits of the preceding 3 financial years.

items.title: 5. Implementation
items.content: Through registered Section-8 partner organisations and own programmes.
